mapper.sql: id, create_time, update_time, user_id, title, content, `status`, reply_content
mapper.insert: insert into tb_feedback (create_time, update_time, user_id, title, content, `status`, reply_content) values (#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{replyContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

mapper.update:
update tb_feedback
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
`status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT},
reply_content = #{replyContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update tb_feedback set create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, content = #{content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, reply_content = #{replyContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

insert into tb_feedback (create_time, update_time, user_id, title, content, `status`, reply_content) values
(#{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.content,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.status,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{item.replyContent,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

on duplicate key update create_time=values(create_time), update_time=values(update_time), user_id=values(user_id), title=values(title), content=values(content), `status`=values(`status`), reply_content=values(reply_content)
